title: Petrushika Trading Limited v The Attorney General (2024/CCZ/0012) [2025] ZMCC 3 (6 March 2025)
case_name: Petrushika Trading Limited v The Attorney General
issue_tags: State Proceedings Act s21(4) and s21(1)–(3); judicial delay (Art.118(2)(b)); applicability of Art.160 (local authorities); remedies against the State (mandamus, Public Finance Management Act, Compensation Fund); requirement to plead sufficient facts when challenging constitutionality.
outcome_detail: Petition fails and is hereby dismissed
